name: J.Jill, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness In this Annual Report, unless otherwise indicated or the context otherwise requires, references to the Company, J.Jill, we, us, and our refer to J.Jill, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. We operate on a 52- or 53-week fiscal year that ends on the Saturday that is closest to January 31. Each fiscal year generally is comprised of four 13-week fiscal quarters, although in the years with 53 weeks, the fourth quarter represents a 14-week period. References in this Annua...
